notes: kaehler_rank_one is a heavily used key API lemma (5+ external callers) proving Ω[K(E)/F] has rank 1 via a 157-line Leibniz/Weierstrass induction; it carries an unexplained maxHeartbeats 1600000. The two formal-group theorems (formalMulByInt_const_zero, pullback_coeff_eq_formal_coeff_mulByInt) appear to be unused documentation aliases — the latter is literally a one-line wrapper around formalMulByInt_linear_coeff with identical statement, and both lack any external callers.
